articles.title: Official SAP npm packages compromised to steal credentials
articles.summary: Multiple official SAP npm packages were compromised in what is believed to be a TeamPCP supply-chain attack to steal credentials and authentication tokens from developers' systems. [...]

articles.title: Popular WordPress redirect plugin hid dormant backdoor for years
articles.summary: The Quick Page/Post Redirect plugin, installed on more than 70,000 WordPress sites, had a backdoor added five years ago that allows injecting arbitrary code into users' sites. [...]

The contrast() filter function increases or decreases the contrast of an element.

contrast() originally handwritten and published with love on CSS-Tricks. You should really get the newsletter as well.

articles.title: contrast-color()
